---
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
---
## Unemploy

https://expinterweb.mites.gob.es/series/


```{r}
serie=window(ts(read.table("unemploy.dat",dec=",")/1e6,start=1996,freq=12),start=c(2000),end=c(2025,12))
(round(serie,3))
```
```{r}
plot(serie,main="Unemploy Spain")
abline(v=1996:2026,col=4,lty=3)

```
